personalInfo.name: Pravin Amalan
personalInfo.title: Frontend Engineer | React and Laravel
personalInfo.bio: I build responsive, production-ready web applications with strong UI quality, clean architecture, and reliable performance. My focus is creating products that are easy to use, easy to maintain, and aligned with business goals.

quickFacts.label: Education
quickFacts.value: M.Sc. Data Analytics and B.Sc. Mathematics

quickFacts.label: Work Preference
quickFacts.value: Full-time role with selective freelance projects

quickFacts.label: Core Strength
quickFacts.value: Frontend architecture, API integration, and delivery ownership

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Designing and building responsive interfaces with React, semantic HTML, and scalable CSS systems for production applications.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Developing secure Laravel APIs and data-driven features with MySQL-backed architecture.

services.title: Legacy Code Migration
services.description: Modernizing legacy PHP products into maintainable Laravel codebases with improved performance and delivery speed.

services.title: Dashboard & CRM Development
services.description: Building business dashboards and CRM workflows with clear UX, role-based flows, and clean data presentation.

services.title: Responsive Web Design
services.description: Creating consistent cross-device experiences with mobile-first layouts and careful UI behavior tuning.

services.title: Performance Optimization
services.description: Improving load time, rendering performance, and runtime efficiency across frontend and backend layers.

projects.title: APARTEASE
projects.subtitle: Multi-Role Apartment & Community Management Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack apartment management platform with dedicated portals for residents, admins, staff, vendors, and super admins; implemented billing and Razorpay payments, complaint and service workflows, gate-pass security logs, attendance management, multilingual UI, and real-time community chat.

projects.title: INFLOWCARE
projects.subtitle: Homecare Agency Management Platform
projects.description: Delivered core UI modules for patient intake, caregiver onboarding, and scheduling operations. Built dynamic forms, reusable components, and admin-facing dashboards for day-to-day business workflows.

projects.title: STORAGE MASTER
projects.subtitle: Storage and Vehicle Rental Management System
projects.description: Led migration from a legacy PHP system to Laravel, rebuilt critical UI and backend modules, and delivered pricing, reservation, and admin control features used in real operations.

projects.title: DJ CRM
projects.subtitle: Event Planning and Music Operations CRM
projects.description: Built and maintained features for event planning workflows, song database management, and authentication-driven operations. Progressed from backend implementation to full ownership of product delivery and deployment.

experience.description: I work across product teams to build and maintain web applications in healthcare, CRM, and rental-management domains. My responsibilities include feature implementation, API integration, UI optimization, and cross-team delivery collaboration.
achievements: Built reusable UI components that improved development velocity across multiple projects.
Delivered frontend and backend features for CRM and management platforms using React and Laravel.
Led a legacy migration project that improved maintainability and performance.
Owned final-phase development, testing, and release coordination for DJ CRM.
